column1: 参数 identity 不能为空
column2: 参数 identity 不能为空

column1: 请至少选择一个缓存项
column2: Please select at least one cache item

column1: WLS 共享命名空间已同步清理
column2: WLS shared namespace has been cleaned up synchronously

column1: 已强制清理所有缓存池（包括持久缓存）
column2: Forcibly cleared all cache pools (including persistent cache)

column1: 已清理所有非持久缓存池
并额外清理 %{1} 个 WLS 共享缓存命名空间
column2: And additionally clean up %{1} WLS shared cache namespaces

column1: 定时任务执行完成！已清理过期缓存文件。
column2: Scheduled Task Execution Completed! Expired Cache Files Have Been Cleaned Up.

column1: 定时任务执行失败: %{1}。请检查 Cron 配置和日志。
column2: Scheduled Task Execution Failed: %{1}. Please Check the Cron Configuration and Logs.

column1: 自动清理过期的缓存文件，防止缓存目录过大
column2: Automatically clean up expired cache files to prevent the cache directory from becoming too large

column1: 缓存清理任务执行失败: %{1}
env 配置写入失败，请检查 app/etc/env.php 权限
column2: Failed to write env configuration, please check app/etc/env.php permissions

column1: 缓存池 %{1} 为持久缓存，需要强制清理（force=1）
column2: Cache pool %{1} is a persistent cache and requires forced cleanup (force=1)

column1: 缓存清理会同时处理缓存池、WLS 共享内存命名空间和 Worker 运行时同步。
column2: Cache cleanup will process the cache pool, WLS shared memory namespace, and Worker runtime synchronization simultaneously.

column1: 缓存清理会直接作用于当前缓存后端，下一次请求将重新装载缓存内容。
column2: Cache cleanup will directly affect the current cache backend; the next request will reload the cache content.

column1: 后台清理入口会尽量统一 WLS、共享内存和 FPM 下的表现。
column2: Backend Cleanup Entry will unify the behavior across WLS, shared memory, and FPM as much as possible.

column1: 按身份、说明、模块或状态定位缓存池，当前视图只展示匹配结果。
column2: Locate cache pool by identity, description, module, or status; the current view only shows matching results.

column1: 启用、禁用和清理都通过统一接口完成，WLS 模式下会继续联动运行时缓存刷新。
column2: Enabling, disabling, and clearing are all done through a unified interface. In WLS mode, runtime cache refresh will continue to be coordinated.

column1: 每个卡片同时展示缓存池配置、命中情况、底层适配器与共享命名空间信息。
column2: Each card displays cache pool configuration, hit rate, underlying adapter, and shared namespace information.

column1: 当前没有匹配的缓存池
column2: No matching cache pool currently exists.

column1: 便于确认自动清理策略是否存在，以及需要时手动触发一次。
column2: To easily confirm whether an auto-cleanup policy exists, and manually trigger it if needed.

column1: 如果你希望后台自动清理过期缓存，可以在 Cron 模块里补充计划任务，或者继续使用上面的手动清理入口。
column2: If you want the system to automatically clean expired caches in the background, you can add a scheduled task in the Cron module, or continue using the manual cleanup entry above.

column1: 当前选择里没有可切换状态的缓存池
column2: No cache pool with a switchable status is available in the current selection.
The selected cache has been cleared

column1: 部分缓存清理失败，请查看提示后重试
column2: Some cache clearing failed, please check the prompts and try again

column1: 确定要禁用所选缓存池吗？禁用后将直接绕过缓存读写。
column2: Are you sure you want to disable the selected cache pool? Once disabled, cache reads and writes will be bypassed directly.

column1: 确定要清理所选缓存池吗？
column2: Are you sure you want to clear the selected cache pool?

column1: 所选缓存里包含持久缓存，将以强制模式清理。是否继续？
column2: The selected cache contains persistent cache, which will be cleared in force mode. Continue?

column1: 确定要清理这个缓存池吗？
column2: Are you sure you want to clear this cache pool?

column1: 该缓存池为持久缓存，后台将以强制模式清理。是否继续？
column2: This cache pool is a persistent cache and will be cleared in forced mode in the background. Continue?

column1: 确定要清理全部非持久缓存吗？这会保留系统关键持久缓存。
column2: Are you sure you want to clear all non-persistent caches? This will keep system-critical persistent caches.

column1: 确定要强制清理全部缓存吗？这会连持久缓存与额外共享命名空间一起处理。
column2: Are you sure you want to force clear all caches? This will also process persistent caches and additional shared namespaces.

column1: 后台执行清理时会同时触达缓存池、WLS Worker 缓存刷新事件以及共享内存命名空间。
column2: Backend execution of cleanup will simultaneously trigger cache pool, WLS Worker cache refresh events, and shared memory namespace.

column1: 当前未检测到共享内存服务连接。缓存池本身仍可清理，但 WLS 共享内存同步能力可能不可用。
column2: No shared memory service connection detected. The cache pool itself can still be cleared, but WLS shared memory sync capability may be unavailable.

column1: 例如 identity、适配器、模块、说明
column2: For example: identity, adapter, module, description

column1: 持久缓存默认保持启用，仅支持强制清理
column2: Persistent cache is enabled by default; only forced clearing is supported
